The Meta Quest 3s runs well on this game if you have the right WiFi connection (I’d recommend 5hz) The App has many different games inside of it to play in Vr ranging from Fps and Destruction games where you can go and destroy objects. I 100% recommend this to anyone who wants a diverse experience with their VR system.

While most of the reviews are about roblox ingeneral, I'm writing about the actual gameplay aside from the child predators that roblox is somehow still allowing. Its just roblox but pretty laggy, it takes awhile to load things, I don't have much to say. I did lose 200 robux because the game touched and bought an item that I didn't accept the purchase. The only decent things about this is having hand movement in natural disaster survival, and the games that allow people who have a vr to "control" players who are on PC or mobile. I can also confirm that most of the reviews about roblox being unsafe for children and the company only wanting to satisfy investors are quite true. Please do your research on roblox if your kid wants the game.

 IMPORTANT MESSAGE: everything said in this review could have been the effects of my only gameplay experience on a device other than a phone could have been me playing it on a Meta Quest 2.

If your phone does not have roblox you cant play any popular roblox games on roblox on the vr. You also cant join groups, make private severs or even do the AI chat check on the vr version on roblox. I'm giving one extra star for pity

I have had a Roblox account for 8+ years, it WAS a good game, I still play it now, but it is slowly becoming something to get the creators  quick money as now publishing a game is behind a pay wall, chat is restricted to age groups, which don't get me wrong isn't bad but chat is now dead because of it, it has made its moderation AI which sucks, and if you encounter a pedo or someone similar, you are supposed to contact Roblox BEFORE the police, all in all they are slowly destroying them selves, it used to be an absolute banger, now it's a cash grab, a sad way to see it go, and I fear the future plans as well... oh and they are splitting Roblox into 3 separate apps, one for 12s and under one for 13 -17 year olds and one for 18+ wtf Roblox

I think one thing needs to be straight; Roblox isn't dead. And in terms of the actual system, it works perfectly fine. But as we all know and everyone is complaining about, Roblox is going berserk on ineffective moderations that's just hurting their platform instead of making it safer, Especially since people have already found ways around it. I'm very sure Roblox is aware of the outcry and dissatisfaction from the people (I mean, at RIA it was literally SILENT as David walked on stage, how could they NOT know?), but they're facing a tough decision; satisfy the people, or satisfy investors. Because all of their incentive lies in investors feeding them money to do these things because it's what they want to see.

Anyway, the game works perfectly fine minus all the new chat stuff, so I think it still deserves a mid rating.
